name: ledger-driven-development
description: Ledger-Driven Development (LDD) + the deliberation court: a multi-agent software methodology. Harvest precious logic out of legacy → distil a minimal spec → build a walking skeleton → loop spec⇄build to zero-gap, made auditable by a twin-ledger spine and driven by orchestrated agents (builder + adversarial-verifier; the council). Includes the UK-law-modelled Council → Appeals Council → Supreme Council hierarchy for high-stakes decisions.
